name: SKY130 Bandgap Voltage Reference v2
description: Tighter TC and PSRR for 20-bit sigma-delta ADC. A 10 ppm/C drift over 165C range = 2 mV shift = 2 LSBs at 20-bit. Must be tight.
margin_rule: Every spec must pass with >= 25% margin

vref_v.description: Output reference voltage at nominal conditions

tc_ppm_c.description: Temperature coefficient -40C to 125C. Tighter than v1 (was <50) for 20-bit ADC.

psrr_dc_db.description: Power supply rejection. Tighter than v1 (was >60) — ADC is more sensitive.

line_regulation_mv_v.description: V_REF change per volt supply change

power_uw.description: Relaxed from v1 (<20) — use the headroom for better TC

startup_time_us.description: Time from power-on to stable V_REF
